pi_items.metadata_value: The DemoDB is a travel agency database
pi_items.verified_value: True - DemoDB is a travel agency database featuring real countries, hotels, restaurants, attractions, profiles, customers, and orders for a travel booking scenario
pi_items.source: Official OrientDB documentation and seed_demodb.py schema definition

pi_items.metadata_value: DemoDB includes predefined classes like Countries, Profiles, Customers, Hotels, Restaurants, Attractions, Orders, Reviews
pi_items.verified_value: True - seed_demodb.py creates: Countries, Profiles, Customers, Hotels, Restaurants, Attractions (base), ArchaeologicalSites, Castles, Monuments (subclasses), Orders, Reviews
pi_items.source: Analyzed seed_demodb.py lines 65-77 showing all vertex classes

pi_items.metadata_value: Airports is a standard class in DemoDB
pi_items.verified_value: False - Airports is NOT part of the standard DemoDB schema
pi_items.source: seed_demodb.py schema definition (lines 65-77) does not create an Airports class; the task explicitly asks the user to create it

privileged_info_summary: The DemoDB is a verified travel agency database schema with documented classes including Countries, Profiles, Customers, Hotels, Restaurants, Attractions (and subclasses), Orders, and Reviews. The Airports class does not exist in the standard DemoDB schema; it is a new class the task requires the user to create with properties Name (mandatory String), IATA_Code (String), and City (String), extending the V (vertex) base class.
